documents_used.name: SLA for Azure Virtual Machines (compute & GPU)
Microsoft Product Terms for Online Services

availability_definition.value: Provided documents index SLA editions but do not include the actual uptime percentages or availability definition text; commitment percentage not present in provided text
availability_definition.citation: The Service Level Agreements (SLA) describe Microsoft's commitments for uptime

source.name: SLA for Azure Virtual Machines (compute & GPU)

credit_regime.value: not specified in provided text; SLA warranty remedies referenced but tier mapping/credit percentages/max/sole-remedy not included
credit_regime.citation: Customer's remedies for breach of this warranty are described in the SLA

claim_mechanics.value: not specified; claim filing, window, and evidence requirements not contained in provided SLA text

sla_exclusions.value: Beta/preview services excluded from SLA (Previews 'not included in the SLA'); throttling for excessive use present. Other exclusions not in provided text.
sla_exclusions.citation: Previews are not included in the SLA for the corresponding Online Service

source.name: Microsoft Product Terms for Online Services

capacity_reservation.value: Consumption services may be sold as prepayments, reservations or other subscriptions (Azure reservations/meters); specific reservation commitment terms negotiated, not published
capacity_reservation.citation: Consumption services may be sold as prepayments, reservations or other subscriptions

source.name: Microsoft Product Terms for Online Services

data_use_ai_training.value: Does not train on customer data by default: generative AI services will not use Customer Data to train foundation models except per customer's documented instructions; Output Content is Customer Data
data_use_ai_training.citation: will not use Customer Data to train any generative AI foundation model, except pursuant to Customer's documented instructions

source.name: Microsoft Product Terms for Online Services

suspension_rights.value: Grounds: AUP/Code of Conduct breach, material breach, non-payment (declined charge), security risk, trade-law risk. Reasonable/30-day notice generally; immediate suspension if needed to prevent unauthorized access or protect systems
suspension_rights.citation: Microsoft will provide reasonable notice before suspending... Unless Microsoft believes an immediate suspension is required

source.name: Microsoft Product Terms for Online Services

termination.value: Termination without cause by either party on 60 days' notice; subscriptions continue to end of current period. Post-termination data: 90 days to extract Customer Data from a disabled account
termination.citation: Either party may terminate this Agreement without cause on 60 days' notice

unilateral_modification.value: Microsoft may update the Agreement; for General Terms/other terms, at least 60 days' notice and changes take effect upon renewal. AUP may be amended anytime without notice. DPA/SLA/Product Terms have their own update rules
unilateral_modification.citation: Customer will be notified at least 60 days before changes take effect to these General Terms

governing_law_disputes.value: Governing law: State of Washington and US federal law. Venue: King County, WA (or Customer HQ / Ireland per party). Binding arbitration: not specified for enterprise customers. Class-action waiver: not specified
governing_law_disputes.citation: governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Washington
